summary.summary: Imported via zip fallback, file count: 582

core_modules.description: Primary high-level data discovery/download orchestration (Fido); best MCP-facing surface for search/fetch workflows.
Factory for constructing map objects from files/data; central entry point for image/map ingestion.
Core solar map abstraction with metadata, WCS-aware operations, and plotting hooks.
Factory entry point for creating time series objects from multiple source formats.
Core time-series abstraction for solar/space-weather data analysis.
Domain coordinate frame definitions used widely in map and ephemeris operations.
Solar ephemeris/geometry utility functions suitable for stateless MCP tools.
Canonical time parsing/normalization helpers; useful as shared MCP utility layer.
Time interval representation for queries and slicing.
Attribute namespace used to build Fido/client queries; required for expressive search filters.
